name: southern_dual_role_test_v1
title: As load grows, Southern raises spending plan to $81B

artifact_excerpt_summary.headline: As load grows, Southern raises spending plan to $81B
body_points: Southern Company raised its five-year spending plan to $81 billion.
The increase is driven by substantial new growth infrastructure investments.
Large-load and data-center demand are increasing.
The company is working on adding 10GW of approved new generation.

why_not_capital_flow_only: the article is not just a spending artifact
it also directly states the physical energy-demand pressure that drives the spending response
why_not_energy_flow_only: the artifact goes beyond pressure and names a concrete capital response

decision.label: both
decision.recommended_handling: Treat Southern-like utility spending-plan artifacts as dual-role artifacts that produce both a capital_flow_signal_candidate and an energy_flow_pressure_signal.
